message:
feat(scan): add CircleCI extractor (.circleci/config.yml)

Implement CircleCI config file extraction for dcg scan:
- is_circleci_path() detects .circleci/config.yml and .circleci/config.yaml
- extract_circleci_from_str() extracts run: steps and nested command: fields
- Supports inline, block scalar (|), and nested command syntax
- Skips non-executable sections (orbs, parameters, environment, etc.)
- Add dispatch logic in main scan function
- Add 12 comprehensive unit tests

Also closes git_safety_guard-5rbb.10 (GitLab CI extractor already implemented)

Closes: git_safety_guard-5rbb.12

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
